titleStmt.title: SII 28.242: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 242. (A.R. No. 397 of 1913.) Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, north wall.

p.hi: Rājakēsarivarman Rājarāja (II?) Year 7, Makara śu. 8, Rēvati, Saturday.
p.note: The details of date given have been equated to 1152 A.D., December 6 Makara in the reign of Rājarāja II by L.D.Swamikannu Pillai on the basis that month Dhanus quoted is a mistake for Makara It is highly improbable that the drafter of the record would have been mistaken about the month. The details correspond to 1221 A.D., January 2, f.d.t. -53; f.d.n. -42 as also to 1222 A.D., January 22, śu. 8-. 59. But the asterism on that day was KArtigai (-97) in the regnal years of Rājarāja III, year 6 and 7 respectively.

summary.p: The text of this inscription is scattered on stones at different places in the temple.

The record is prefaced by the meykkīrtti starting with Pūmaruviya tirumādum which is known to have been drafted for the king, Parakēsari Rājarāja II and to have been adopted by his successor Rājakēsari Rājādhirāja II in his earlier years, Among Chōḻa Rājarājas only the first and third were Rājakēsarivarmans. Palaeography rules out the identification of the king of the record with the first. It could have been the third but he is not otherwise known to have adopted the mey-kkīrtti of the king this record.

The record tells about a resoluation of the mahāsabhā of brahmadēyam Uṟumūr alias Vikkiramachōḻa-chcharupēdimaṅgalam in Meṟkā-nāḍu in Vaḍakarai Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, to pay 55 kalam of paddy annually to the temple of God Tiruvirāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-periyanāyanār, the amount of paddy having been partly the interest on 60 kāśu they had taken from that temple in a time of stress due to bad times and shortness of cash (akkam), and partly in adjustment against an equal amount of paddy due from the sabhā to the temple as a consolidated payment of tan(?)-kaḍamai, pāḍi-kāval, chilvari, āḷ-amañji and such levies in respect of 2 mā (1/2) kāṇi of land at the rate of 26 kalam, 3 kuṟuṇi per mā, the said land having been that half of the land which was stipulated to be iṟaiili-dēvadāna out of 4 mā one kāṇi gifted to the temple as dēvadāna by Vāsudēvan Periyān alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala-mūvēndavēḷāṉ the uḍaiyāṉ of Poygaiaraiśūr-oḻukarai of Tirumuṉaippāḍi in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. The land concerned had been purchased by the donor partly from the sabhā out of its common land and partly from four individual brahmins.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum ceyamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum naya
ntu pulka Arumaṟaiviti neṟiyaṉaittun taḻaippa
varumuṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇ
kuṭaitticaikaḷuṟeṭṭun taṅka taṉikkūṭa
ntāneṉa viḷaṅ(ki)k karuṅkalippaṭṭi
yaiyc ceṅkol turappa poruṅkati
rāḻi puvi vaḷarttuṭan vara villavariraṭṭar miṉavar ciṅkaḷar
pallavar teluṅkar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpil maṇṇakam puṇantu cem
pon virasiṅkāsaṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyā(ḷ)ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecarivarmmarāṉa tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ staśrī
rājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu Aṭṭamiyuñ caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Irevati nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarācapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu meṟk
kāṉāṭṭu bramateyam śrīuṟumurāṉa vikkiramacoḻaccaruppeti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūṟt tiruvirāmiśvaramuṭaiya periyanāyanāṟkku tevatāṉamāka rājarājavaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭip po
ykai Araicūr Oḻukaṟai Uṭaiyāṉ vāsutevan periyānāṉa tirucciṟṟampala muventaveḷān Eṅkaḷ pakkal tevatāṉamāka koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam Ivvūr cantiracekarava
tikku kiḻakku viracoḻa vāykkālukku tekku munṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu sabhai potu nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñca
tirattu nilam Araikkāṇiyum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu Āritan tiruvikkiraman tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭan Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal koṇṭu viṭṭa taṭi I
raṇṭināl nilam mukkāṇi Araik kāṇiyum munṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu munṟāñ catirattu Āritan tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyān Ātittan pakkal koṇṭuviṭṭa nilam mukkāṇi
Araikkāṇiyum Iṅke kāśyapa ĀritanRead kāśyapa āritan ndakṣaṇāmutti śrīveda viyāsaṉ(ṉa) Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam Oru māvum Iṅke Āritan kecavan Āśrīrāman pak
kal koṇṭuviṭṭa nilam Oru māvum Āka nilam nālu māk kāṇiyil varicaip pātiyāl Iṟaiyili devatānamāka niṅkum nila Iraṇṭu mā Araik kāṇi nikki nilam Ira
ṇṭu mā Araik kāṇikku tankaṭamai pāṭikāval cilvari Āḷ Amaiñci maṟṟepper paṭṭutum Uḷpaṭa māttāl nellu Irupattu Aṟu kalane mukkuṟuṇi
Āka nilam Iraṇṭu mā Araikkāṇikku nellu Aimpattu Aiṅ kalam Innellu Aimpattu Aiṅkalamum Ivvāṇṭu mutal cantirātittavaṟ ṉāṅkaḷe A
ṉṟāṭu koyiṟṟamaṟku Innilattukku kaṭamaiyāka Innellu Aimpattu Aiyṅkalamum Iṟukkakaṭavomāka Ivvūrkku kālandoṣattālum Akkattāḻcciyālum Eṅkaḷukku
jivaṉañ cellāmaiyāl tiruvirāmiśvaramuṭaiya pe
riya nāyanār śrīpaṇṭārattu koṇṭa kācu
Aṟupatu Ikkācu Aṟupatukku kācu Oṉṟukku Ā
ṭṭu Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇi nellup pa
licai polivatāka kācu Aṟupatukku Āṭṭu
Ippaṭi Itan meṟku Iraṇṭu patti viṭṭu mekke veṭṭituLines 32-34 are also meant to indicate because of insufficiency of space continuation was inscribed in the ñagadi-ppaḍi of the chadiram.
Aimpattu Ayṅkala nellu polivatākavum Innellu Aimpat
tu Ayṅ kalamum Innilattukku varicaiyiṟ pātiyāl Iṟukkum nila
m Iraṇṭu mā Araik kāṇikku kaṭamai Āka Ivvāṇṭu mutal cantirāti
ttavaṟ Iṟukka kaṭavomāka sammatittu Ivūr tiruvikattiśvaramuṭaiya ciṟu
ttirukkoyiyile kallu veṭṭik kuṭuttom Immahā sabhaiyom pakiyaIt seems that the preceding line and continuation of line 31 are lost.Lines 32-34 are also meant to indicate because of insufficiency of space continuation was inscribed in the ñagadi-ppaḍi of the chadiram.
Ippaṭikku Ivviṭattil Iṭam
potāmaiyil Iccatirattu
jakatippaṭaiyil kiḻakka ṟṟi veṭṭiyatu]
Oḻukaṟai Uṭaiyāṉ vāsutevan periyānāṉa tirucciṟṟampala muventaveḷān Uṟumur periya nāyaṉāṟkku koṇṭuviṭṭa nilattukkum Iṟai Iḻicciṉapaṭikkum pon tiruperiyanāyanār tiruvācalil sabhai mukamāka Iruntu paṇittār Āritan tiruvikkiraman
tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭan paṇiyālum kāśyapa Āritan ndakṣaṇāmurtti śrīvetaviyāsaṉan paṇiyālum Āritan tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyān Ātitta paṇiyālum Āritan celvan kaṇṇan paṇi
yālum Āritan kecavan Āṉa śrīrāman paṇiyālum Āritan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa paṇiyālum Ivvaṉaivar paṇiyāl Ivvūr matdhastan peruntoṭṭamuṭaiyān śrīkṛṣṇan veṇkāṭu tevan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan tiruvikkiraman tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭiku Ivai kāśyapa Āritan ndakṣaṇāmurtti śrīvetaviyāsaṉn Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan tiruvirāṭṭāṉamuṭaiyān Ātittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āritan Āritittā kkatevan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku celvan kaṇṇan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Āritankecavan Ācirāman Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan Ātittan Ātittan tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu
vaṉ Ivvūr Āritaṉ tiruviraṭṭāṉa
dekṣiṇāmurtti śrīvetaviyāsaṉṉen pe
cirāmaṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 28.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
